description: The Value Spatial Variable Driver`1 component samples from Spatial variables intersecting the slot it is on and gets a value.

fields.DriveX: Field X to drive with the sampled variable.
fields.DriveY: Field Y to drive with the sampled variable.
fields.DriveZ: Field Z to drive with the sampled variable.
fields.VariableName: the name of the variable to be sampling for.
fields.Mode: How to interpret the sampled values.
fields.DefaultValue: The value to default to when no value can be sampled.
fields.computeInLocalSpace: If the sampling distance will be scaled to the slots scale or revert to global 1,1,1 scale

usage: Attach to a slot and provide a fields to drive and a variable name. the slot this component is on acts as the position for sampling variable values and do some math.
